# Heady™ — The World's First Sovereign AI Operating System

Built on sacred geometry, φ-scaled architecture, and a 17-Swarm Matrix of 89 specialized bee types — Heady doesn't just run AI. It *is* AI, organizing itself continuously through Continuous Semantic Logic (CSL) rather than rigid if/else code.

## What Makes Heady Different

### Continuous Semantic Logic (CSL)
Every decision is a cosine similarity gate, not a boolean branch. The system operates on a 0.0–1.0 confidence spectrum, routing work to the bee best matched to the task's vector signature.

### φ-Scaled Architecture
Backoff intervals, heartbeat timings, and instance scaling floors are derived from the golden ratio (φ = 1.618) and Fibonacci sequence — the same proportions found in biological growth and self-organizing systems.

### 17 Swarm Matrix
89 specialized AI sub-agents (bees) organized into 17 domain-specific swarms. No single point of failure. No CEO bee. Pure emergent orchestration.

### 22-Stage HCFP Pipeline
The Heady Core Full Pipeline processes every request through 22 validated stages — from intake and vector encoding through multi-model inference, consensus, memory write-back, and observability.

### Zero Vendor Lock-In
Claude Sonnet/Opus → Groq Llama → GPT-4o → Gemini 2.5 → Workers AI. If one provider fails, the next answers within milliseconds.
